properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v6 v7 v7 v2 v3 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: /: Who is like the Lord There is no one Who is like the Lord He is strong and mighty Who is like the Lord He is worthy Stand up and give Him the praise :/

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Praise the Lord Praise the Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Our God is worthy of glory From the rising of the sun To its going down The name of the Lord is to be praised

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Who is like the Lord There is no one Who is like the Lord He is strong and mighty Who is like the Lord He is worthy Stand up and give Him the praise

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: /: Stand up and praise Him And give Him the glory :/ x7

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Our God is worthy of praise!

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Stand up and give Him the praise!

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Who is like the Lord There is no one Who is like the Lord He is strong and mighty Who is like the Lord He is worthy

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Stand up and give Him the praise Come on and Stand up and give Him the praise Come on and Stand up and give Him the praise Praise the Lord!
